scripts.start:all: concurrently -n api,notifications,web -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter=api start" "pnpm --filter=notifications start" "pnpm --filter=web start"
scripts.start:prod: pnpm --filter=db db:migrate:prod && concurrently -n api,notifications,web -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter=api start" "pnpm --filter=notifications start" "pnpm --filter=web start:prod"
